---
title: "Kate Wilson Helmore"
---

## Kate Wilson Helmore

**Dates:** (1816/7-1886)

**Maiden name:** (Pridham)

### Description

mother of Katherine Olive Helmore

### Biography

She was the wife of the Rev. Thomas Helmore (1811-1890), Precentor of St. Mark\'s College Chelsea and master of the choristers of the Chapel Royal, and her sister was married to Derwent Coleridge.

### Letters

- Letter from April 29th [1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
